data.title: Circle Home Charity and DHL Employees Partner to Donate Household Appliances to Families in Need
data.description: In Guelph, Ontario on March 13, 2026, Circle Home Charity collaborated with Danby Appliances and community leader Jim Estill, along with employees from DHL, in a joint effort to gather and distribute small household appliances to aid families transitioning into new residences. This initiative aimed to provide assistance to these families and was made possible through the involvement of various partners.

data.title: Why Is ImmunityBio Stock Soaring On Friday?
data.description: Shares of ImmunityBio Inc. (NASDAQ: IBRX) saw an increase on Friday as the company wrapped up manufacturing engineering programs for its NK cell therapy platform. The surge in IBRX stock is attributed to the establishment of a safe, reproducible, and scalable manufacturing pathway. ImmunityBio successfully completed its NK2022 (Cancer and Healthy Volunteers) and NK2023 (Healthy Volunteers) programs, involving 64 participants with no serious adverse events. The company showcased its capability to generate up to five billion NK cells from a single apheresis collection. Furthermore, ImmunityBio is progressing with its phase 1 trial (QUILT-3.076), where M-ceNK cells are being combined with ANKTIVA, showing promising results.
